form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 3rd on April 7 over 410m at Horsham behind Lightning Jewel beaten 7 lengths (23.78) in a Special conditions Veteran race. Has scored three times from this draw. Key runner.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish third (23.05) at Geelong over 400m. Holds top-three claims.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running and set it up early clocking 22.43 with a 3.5 lengths win at this track over 390m. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at the last two runs, both at Geelong, the latest when beaten 8 lengths behind Eat Your Spinach over 400m. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split and led until late but gathered in when a 1.3 lengths second at this track over 390m in 22.31. Although unsuccessful last time still ran one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with him.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in her races, Last start finished eighth over 450m at this track, beaten 7 lengths. Others have better credentials.
